heading: Databricks
content:
Databricks processes over 2 billion queries daily and is trusted by 10,000+ organizations worldwide. iSeyon Analytics helps organizations unlock the full value of their data by building scalable, cloud-native analytics and AI solutions. iSeyon Analytics enables enterprises to modernize their data platforms, accelerate insights, and drive data-driven decision-making using the Databricks Lakehouse architecture.

#### **Unified Data & AI Platform**

iSeyon Analytics implements Databricks as a unified platform that brings together data engineering, analytics, data science, and machine learning. By combining the flexibility of data lakes with the performance and reliability of data warehouses, iSeyon Analytics helps organizations simplify their data architecture and reduce operational complexity. According to Databricks, this lakehouse approach reduces data infrastructure costs by up to 70%.

#### **Data Engineering & ETL Pipelines**

The iSeyon Analytics team designs and builds robust, high-performance data pipelines using Apache Spark on Databricks. iSeyon Analytics enables seamless ingestion, transformation, and processing of large-scale structured and unstructured data from multiple sources, ensuring high data quality, reliability, and scalability.

#### **Advanced Analytics & Business Intelligence**

iSeyon Analytics helps businesses leverage Databricks for advanced analytics and reporting by enabling fast SQL analytics on large datasets. Our solutions integrate Databricks with leading BI tools, allowing stakeholders to gain real-time insights and actionable intelligence from a single source of truth.

#### **Machine Learning & AI Solutions**

The iSeyon Analytics Databricks machine learning services support the complete ML lifecycle—from data preparation and feature engineering to model training, experimentation, and deployment. Using built-in ML capabilities and MLflow, iSeyon Analytics helps organizations operationalize AI models and move them efficiently into production.

#### **Cloud-Native & Scalable Architecture**

iSeyon Analytics deploys Databricks on leading cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud, ensuring secure, scalable, and cost-optimized solutions. Our cloud-native implementations are designed to handle growing data volumes while maintaining performance and governance.

#### **Security, Governance & Automation**

iSeyon Analytics implements enterprise-grade security, access controls, and data governance within Databricks. Our solutions include workflow automation, job scheduling, monitoring, and cost optimization to ensure reliable and compliant data operations.

#### **Seamless Integration & Modernization**

iSeyon Analytics helps organizations modernize legacy data systems by integrating Databricks with existing databases, data warehouses, and applications. This enables a smooth transition to a modern data platform without disrupting ongoing business operations.
homePageDescription: iSeyon Analytics builds scalable analytics and AI solutions using Databricks, trusted by 10,000+ organizations.
